await contract.addCandidate("Bob")
await contract.addCandidate("Alice")
const contract = await ethers.getContractAt("Voting", "YOUR_NEW_ADDRESS")
await contract.voters("0xE6feD7C75e1fBe5fe8A23C7Cd9f8e5e443fE0e91")
const contract = await ethers.getContractAt("Voting", "0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3") 
await contract.hasVoted("0xE6feD7C75e1fBe5fe8A23C7Cd9f8e5e443fE0e91")
await contract.voters("0xE6feD7C75e1fBe5fe8A23C7Cd9f8e5e443fE0e91")
await contract.addVoter("0xE6feD7C75e1fBe5fe8A23C7Cd9f8e5e443fE0e91")
const contract = await ethers.getContractAt("Voting", "0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3")
.exit
await contract.addVoter("0xE6feD7C75e1fBe5fe8A23C7Cd9f8e5e443fE0e91")
const contract = await ethers.getContractAt("Voting", "0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3")
await contract.addCandidate("Bob")
await contract.addCandidate("Alice")
const contract = await ethers.getContractAt("Voting", "0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3")ntractAt("Voting", "0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3")
